question: NTC may grant the authorization to install and operate a repeater to whom?

choices.D: Only to duly recognized amateur associations, clubs or societies

question: A least how many licensed members must a club have, as one of the requirements, to be accredited by the NTC?

Which of the following is a ground for suspension/revocation of an amateur license?

choices.A: Intentional harmful interfering or jamming of legitimate licensed radio stations
choices.B: Engaging in amateur work without a valid license or performing  said work in behalf of a licensed amateur without proper authority
choices.C: Making any false statement in the application for license

When shall an amateur make his station and documents available for NTC inspection?

choices.A: Any time upon request by an NTC representative or inspector with a Mission Order
choices.C: Anytime upon request by an official observer from the amateur community
choices.D: Upon release of the initial station license

question: In April 2011, NTC issued Memorandum Circular 04-03-2011 on some frequencies which shall be used at times of disasters and national emergencies. Which frequencies on 2m and 40m shall be used by amateurs as calling frequencies under this MC?

What is required if a person wants to sell or transfer his transmitter or transceiver to another on a single transaction?

choices.A: He must obtain a permit to own or possess a transmitter or transceiver from the NTC.
choices.B: He must obtain a dealer's permit from the NTC.
choices.C: He must obtain a permit to sell or transfer from the NTC.
choices.D: He must provide the next owner a photocopy of his radio station license.
